creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: beech
Date: Fri Mar  8 05:35:50 2013
New Revision: 313615
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313615

Log:
  - Update to 1.3.7,1
  
  PR:		ports/176738
  Submitted by:	nemysis <nemysis@gmx.ch> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/net/enet/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/enet/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/net/enet/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/net/enet/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/enet/Makefile	Fri Mar  8 03:49:41 2013	(r313614)
+++ head/net/enet/Makefile	Fri Mar  8 05:35:50 2013	(r313615)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	enet
-PORTVERSION=	1.3.6
+PORTVERSION=	1.3.7
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://enet.bespin.org/download/
@@ -12,17 +12,21 @@ COMMENT=	Simple and robust communication
 
 LICENSE=	MIT
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
-
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	aclocal automake autoconf libtool
 ACLOCAL_ARGS=	-I ${LOCALBASE}/share/aclocal
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
-PORTDOCS=	*
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+PLIST_SUB+=	PORTDOCS=""
+.else
+PLIST_SUB+=	PORTDOCS="@comment "
+.endif
+
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/^pkgconfigdir/s|$$(libdir)|$$(prefix)/libdata|' \
 		${WRKSRC}/Makefile.am

Modified: head/net/enet/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net/enet/distinfo	Fri Mar  8 03:49:41 2013	(r313614)
+++ head/net/enet/distinfo	Fri Mar  8 05:35:50 2013	(r313615)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

-SIZE (enet-1.3.6.tar.gz) = 521430
+SHA256 (enet-1.3.7.tar.gz) = 15acbfd8e3aaf353320a60c785093cdf34f2ae207bcdd489503ca3f37659fe15
+SIZE (enet-1.3.7.tar.gz) = 522150
